hero.eyebrow: Outsourced sales infrastructure for B2B founders
hero.h1: Stop being the only salesperson in your company.
hero.subheadline: We place a vetted SDR, build the playbook they run on, and manage the pipeline. Your first qualified meeting in 30 days, or we keep working until you get it.

cards.title: You’re the only one selling.
cards.body: Every qualified conversation comes through you. That means every deal depends on your time, your energy, and your calendar. The business cannot grow faster than you can personally sell. You know it. You’ve known it for a while.

cards.title: You hired a rep and it didn’t work.
cards.body: Six months. Eighty thousand dollars. And you ended up back on every call yourself. The rep ramped slowly because there was no playbook. There was no playbook because no one built it first. That’s not a hiring problem. That’s a system problem.

solution.heading: The sales function you’ve been trying to build.
solution.subhead: Not a lead-gen service. Not a rep marketplace. A managed system: playbook, infrastructure, a placed SDR, and ongoing pipeline management. All in one engagement.

cards.title: Assigned SDR Placement
cards.body: A vetted, briefed outbound rep placed inside your sales function. Briefed on your ICP, your playbook, and your outreach sequences before the first call. Deployed within 14 days.

cards.title: Sales Playbook Build
cards.body: A documented sales playbook: ICP definition, discovery framework, objection handling, sequence scripts, and pipeline stage criteria. Built in week one so the rep hits the ground running.

cards.title: Outbound System Build
cards.body: Full outbound infrastructure: CRM configuration, email sequence setup, LinkedIn outreach logic, lead list build, and tracking. Everything in place before outreach begins.

cards.title: Pipeline Management
cards.body: Ongoing management of the outbound pipeline: weekly Monday reports, reply handling, meeting scheduling, and live CRM dashboard access. You stay in the loop without managing the day-to-day.

steps.title: Audit and Onboarding
steps.body: We learn your ICP, your buying triggers, and your competitive landscape in week one. We document the playbook your rep will run on every call and brief them on the top objections your buyers raise.

steps.title: Build and Launch
steps.body: Your SDR goes live. Outreach starts within 14 days. First qualified conversations typically appear in week two or three across cold email and LinkedIn.

steps.title: Scale and Refine
steps.body: Weekly reporting, sequence testing, and pipeline reviews. You see every metric. We adjust the playbook until the system is predictable and the pipeline is consistent.

cards.problem: Growing SaaS with no outbound infrastructure. Founder doing every prospecting call.
cards.result: Full outbound system built from zero. 120 qualified appointments booked.

cards.problem: DM-to-call pipeline with no system. Leads going cold before follow-up.
cards.result: DM outreach system built. Conversion rate improved 2.4x.

cards.problem: Add your next case study here.
cards.result: Contact us to discuss your results.

cards.objection: “They won’t understand my business well enough to sell it.”
cards.response: That’s why we build the playbook before the rep goes live. Week one is ICP definition, discovery scripting, and objection mapping with you in the room. The rep learns your business on your terms, not ours. We’ve done this across SaaS, health, legal, fintech, private equity, web agencies, and recruitment. Every engagement starts with a custom build, not a generic script.

cards.objection: “I’ll pay for months and get nothing.”
cards.response: Most clients see their first qualified meeting within 30 days. If month two ends without a single meeting booked, we extend at no cost until we hit the target. That’s the guarantee. It’s in writing.

You get a weekly Monday report: outreach volume, reply rate, meetings booked, pipeline value added. You have live CRM dashboard access at all times. We handle reply management, meeting scheduling, and sequence adjustments. Your job is to show up to the qualified meetings we book.

riskReversal.heading: Our guarantee.
riskReversal.body: Most clients see their first qualified meeting within 30 days. If month two ends without a single meeting booked, we extend at no cost until we hit the target.

pricingAnchor.heading: One engagement. Full sales infrastructure.
inclusions: ICP definition and sales playbook built in week one
Vetted SDR placed and briefed, live within 14 days
Full outbound system: CRM, email sequences, LinkedIn outreach, lead lists
Ongoing pipeline management with weekly Monday reporting
Live CRM dashboard access throughout the engagement
Guarantee: first qualified meeting within 30 days or we extend at no cost

items.q: How quickly can we get started?
items.a: Most clients are live within 14 days. Week one is playbook build and rep briefing. Week two is outreach launch. First qualified conversations typically appear in week two or three.

items.q: Do I need to have a sales process in place before we begin?
items.a: No. Building the process is the first thing we do. Week one is ICP definition, discovery framework, objection scripting, and sequence build. The rep does not touch prospects until the playbook is done.

items.q: What industries do you work with?
items.a: We have built sales systems for clients in SaaS, health and wellness, legal, fintech, private equity, web agencies, and recruitment. Every engagement starts with a custom ICP build, so the industry is a starting point, not a constraint.
If month two ends without a single meeting booked, we extend the engagement at no cost until we hit the target. The guarantee is in writing before we start.

items.q: How much time will this take from me?
items.a: Week one requires your input: ICP definition, discovery call review, objection mapping. After that, you receive a weekly Monday report and have live CRM access. We handle reply management, meeting scheduling, and sequence adjustments. Your job is to show up to the qualified meetings.

items.q: What happens if a rep isn’t performing?
items.a: Rep performance is our responsibility, not yours. If a placed rep is not hitting sequence targets, we replace them. You are not managing the rep. We are.

We do not publish pricing because every engagement is scoped to your business: the ICP, the outreach channels, the rep profile, and the pipeline complexity. Book a strategy call and we will scope the engagement before we talk numbers.

cta.formSubtext: No spam. One call, no commitment. We review your situation before we talk.

footer.tagline: Outsourced sales infrastructure for B2B founders.
